user.title: EARLY (Timeular) Setup
user.description: Enter your EARLY API credentials. You can generate these in your EARLY account settings under 'API & Integrations'.

bluetooth_confirm.title: EARLY Tracker Discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to add the {name} Bluetooth tracker to Home Assistant?

bluetooth_api.title: EARLY API Credentials (Optional)
bluetooth_api.description: To display activity names for {name}, provide your EARLY API credentials. You can skip this step to only track orientation. API credentials can be generated in your EARLY account settings under 'API & Integrations'.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to EARLY API. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API credentials. Please check your API Key and API Secret.
error.missing_credentials: Both API Key and API Secret are required. Leave both blank to skip API setup.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This EARLY account is already configured.
